summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Brand Mafia Kashmir Factory Outlet retail management system. Data restoration from backup successful with correct counts (7 items, 5 customers, 4 stores). Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Critical frontend React component issues preventing full navigation.

ui_bugs.issue: React runtime errors: SelectItem must have a value prop that is not an empty string
ui_bugs.impact: Prevents navigation to most pages, causes UI to become unresponsive

ui_bugs.issue: Navigation timeouts after React errors - cannot access Customers, Stores, Employees, Attendance, Vouchers, Settings pages
ui_bugs.impact: Blocks access to 75% of application functionality

integration_issues.issue: React component errors cause navigation elements to become unclickable

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with correct restored data (7 items, 5 customers, 4 stores)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix React SelectItem component errors by ensuring all Select components have proper non-empty string values for their value props. This is causing critical navigation failures preventing access to most pages in the application.
